name: Center Club Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off and discard wing tips.
2. Separate each wing at the joint.
3. At the drumstick joint, separate bones with a small knife and push meat to the tip.
4. Remove any smaller bones and discard them.
5. Mix all remaining ingredients in a large bowl.
6. Add chicken and coat well.
7. Refrigerate coated chicken for at least 24 hours.
8. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Line a baking pan with foil and place a rack over the foil, coating the rack first with cooking spray.
10. Drain the chicken, reserving the liquid.
11. Place the chicken on the rack and roast for 30 minutes.
12. Baste the wings and turn them over, then return to the oven for an additional 30 minutes.
